parameters.query:
WITH claimed AS (
  UPDATE ingestion_jobs
  SET state = 'processing',
      started_at = COALESCE(started_at, NOW()),
      updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE id IN (
    SELECT id
    FROM ingestion_jobs
    WHERE state = 'queued' AND job_type = 'embedding'
    ORDER BY created_at ASC
    LIMIT 50
    FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
  )
  RETURNING id AS "jobId", organization_id AS "organizationId", knowledge_source_id AS "knowledgeSourceId", source_record_id AS "sourceRecordId"
)
SELECT * FROM claimed;

SELECT sr.id AS "sourceRecordId", sr.organization_id AS "organizationId", sr.knowledge_source_id AS "knowledgeSourceId", sr.record_key AS "recordKey", sr.topic, sr.source_kind AS "sourceKind", sr.title, sr.body_markdown AS "bodyMarkdown", sr.body_json AS "bodyJson", sr.source_url AS "sourceUrl", sr.source_anchor AS "sourceAnchor", sr.version, sr.checksum, ks.source_family AS "sourceFamily", ks.source_type AS "sourceType", ks.title AS "sourceTitle", COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('fieldName', field_name, 'fieldValue', field_value, 'fieldType', field_type, 'fieldOrder', field_order, 'isKey', is_key) ORDER BY field_order) FROM source_record_fields WHERE source_record_id = sr.id), '[]'::json) AS fields FROM source_records sr JOIN knowledge_sources ks ON ks.id = sr.knowledge_source_id WHERE sr.id = '{{$json.sourceRecordId}}'::uuid AND sr.organization_id = '{{$json.organizationId}}'::uuid LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS "draftCount" FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{$json.chunks}}'::jsonb) AS chunk;

UPDATE ingestion_jobs SET state = 'processing', started_at = COALESCE(started_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{$json.jobId}}'::uuid RETURNING id AS "jobId", state, retry_count AS "retryCount";

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { normalized: true, chunkCount: Array.isArray($node["Build Derived Chunks"].json.chunks) ? $node["Build Derived Chunks"].json.chunks.length : 0, jobId: $node["Normalize Source Record"].json.jobId || null, organizationId: $node["Normalize Source Record"].json.organizationId || null, knowledgeSourceId: $node["Normalize Source Record"].json.knowledgeSourceId || null, sourceRecordId: $node["Normalize Source Record"].json.sourceRecordId || null } }];
